sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65123" key="massa/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μασσάομαι</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μασί-σσημα</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μασί-σσησις</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μασι-σσητήρ</orth>, incorrectly written for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μασάομαι</foreign>, etc. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μάσσεται</orth>, <sense id="n65123.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μαίομαι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
